title: Per-stage manifest
description: Written by run_preregistration._record_phase to manifests/stage_<phase>.json each time a phase completes. Shape mirrors the value type stored under run_manifest.phases[<phase>] in the aggregate run manifest, plus an explicit phase name field.

phase.description: The phase name, e.g. 'materialize-data', 'setup', 'train'. Hyphens here; the manifest filename uses the underscore-substituted form.

completed_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the phase completed. Shares the value the aggregate run_manifest.json records for the same phase.

outputs.description: Phase-specific outputs payload. Shape varies by phase; permissive.
